chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-7511 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Directions For Order as to non-prosecution of CMA No. 9632/2023 30.01.2026. Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, A.A.G. --------------- No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner to pursue the listed application, which has been put up in Court today for non- prosecution, with compliance not having been made for purpose of issuance of notice despite time having been granted on an earlier date. Under the circumstances, it appears that the Petitioner has lost interest in the application, which stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
